property_address: Flat 123, Sample street, Sample city, AB1 CD3

rooms.name: Balcony
rooms.summary: Open exterior balcony area with composite deck flooring, painted rendered walls and black metal balustrading. Overall decorative order appears good and the space looks structurally sound, with only minor surface marking visible; the balcony is generally clean and well maintained. No loose or damaged fittings are evident in the images provided.

defects: small white surface mark visible mid level to floor

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: A high-spec contemporary bathroom presented in very good decorative order overall, with extensive glossy tiling, fitted sanitaryware and mirrored storage. The room appears generally clean and well maintained, with only light evidence of use such as minor water spotting/cleaning residue on polished surfaces and some visible reflective marks. No significant damage is evident in the supplied photographs.

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: The bedroom is decorated in a modern, neutral style with emulsioned white/magnolia walls, a white ceiling and pale carpet. The room appears generally clean and in good decorative order, with furnished bed, bedside tables, lamps and fitted ventilation above. A number of light wear marks are visible to the walls, door and soft furnishings, and the bed/mattress show minor soiling and age-related marks.

rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.summary: The entrance hall is presented in generally good decorative order with white painted walls and white skirting to a light oak-effect laminate floor. The space appears clean and well maintained overall, with only light surface marks visible to some wall areas and the internal doors; the floor and fittings are otherwise in sound condition.

rooms.name: Reception & Open Plan Kitchen
rooms.summary: A contemporary reception and open plan kitchen presented in good decorative order overall, with a clean, high-spec finish throughout. The room is generally well maintained and tidy, with the kitchen appliances appearing clean and serviceable, although the soft furnishings and some walls/fittings show light marks or wear. Window glazing appears sound; cleanliness varies slightly, with some items requiring light cleaning and the utility cupboard showing practical use-related clutter.

rooms.summary: Purpose-built walk-in wardrobe presented in generally good decorative order with white painted walls/ceiling and fitted timber-effect storage. The room appears clean overall, with light wear only; the carpet shows noticeable pile flattening and shading from use, and there are a few minor marks to wall/door surfaces and door edges.
